zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Hiltoft於大約1327年出生在英國林可爾史爾英格爾德梅爾斯時，她的父親William Hiltoft16歲，母親Alice de Muer25歲。她於1351年之前與William Skipwith II在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1370年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比享年44歲。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Hiltoft was born about 1327, in Ingoldmells, Lincolnshire, England, her father, William Hiltoft, was 16 and her mother, Alice de Muer, was 25. She married William Skipwith II before 1351, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1370, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Hiltoft(이)가 대략 1327년 영국 링코실르 잉드스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Hiltoft(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Muer(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1351년 이전 영국 링코실르에서 William Skipwith II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Hiltoft родилась около 1327 г. в местности инголдмеллс, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Hiltoft было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Muer, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Skipwith II перед 1351 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1370 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет.
